description: Fix review issues: (1) School-scoped slug uniqueness, (2) Admin credential env var, (3) Limit condition logs for admin mode, (4) Disable write operations for admin mode
steps: STEP 1 - Fix zoneSlugExists to accept schoolId parameter, add .eq('school_id', schoolId) or .is('school_id', null) filter, and use .limit(1) to prevent throw on multiple matches. Update createUniqueZoneSlug to accept schoolId. Update createInventoryZone to pass input.school_id.
STEP 2 - Move admin credential to env var: read from process.env.ADMIN_ACCESS_CODE with fallback to 'admin'. Update .env.example.
STEP 3 - Fix condition logs query: when activeItemIds.size > 0, always apply .in('item_id', [...activeItemIds]) filter regardless of schoolId.
STEP 4 - Disable write operations for admin mode: hide Tambah Barang, edit/delete zone buttons, and edit/delete item buttons when isAdmin is true.
acceptance_criteria: Admin credential is read from ADMIN_ACCESS_CODE env var with 'admin' fallback
Condition logs query always filters by activeItemIds when not empty
Write action buttons are hidden in admin mode
